scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules artifacts/*/node_modules artifacts/*/dist 2>/dev/null || rmdir /s /q node_modules artifacts\*/node_modules artifacts\*/dist 2>nul || echo 'Clean complete'
scripts.fresh: pnpm clean && pnpm install && pnpm dev
